title: Visual QA
description:
Please note that we will never request payment or bank account information at any stage of the recruitment process. As we continue to grow our teams, we urge you to be cautious of fraudulent job postings or recruitment activities that misuse our company name and information. Please protect your personal information during any recruitment process. While Monks may contact potential candidates via LinkedIn, all applications must be submitted through our official website (monks.com/careers).
   

  

**Monks is searching for an Visual QA engineer (Not Software QA Engineer) who will take the lead in ensuring our work looks as promised on behalf of big international clients.**
**Role \\& Responsibilities**
* In this mid\\-level role, you’ll be working on international projects together with Monks in other offices.
* You’ll employ your knowledge of manual testing methods to assess and ascertain the correct, visual display and copy (in and out) and compliance with technical specifications of advertising assets such as display ads, social content, TVCs etc.
* You ensure that every asset looks the way it should on any browser and device as well as platform fit based on the technical specifications.
* You’re the last line of defence before our work gets served to the general public, saving your coworkers from potentially embarrassing mistakes.
* Like a broken record (that isn’t broken), you constantly ask: is the design pixel\\-perfect, and does it meet guidelines, specs and other requirements?
* You help to better integrate visual \\& technical quality assurance into the overall production process, making sure our production and testing methods are tuned to the project.
* You help educate our Monks on best practices with regard to versioning and formatting so that more and more assets look perfect from the get\\-go, reducing everyone’s workload.


**Requirements**
* For this QA role, we’re looking for someone who wants to specialize in visually vetting designs as well as rigorously checking and ensuring their technical compliance with specifications.
* It is a plus if you have a background in the Design field.
* You have at least 3 years of relevant QA\\-testing experience.
* You’re a proficient English communicator, able to provide clear feedback and knowing how to describe issues and required actions to Monks in other offices.
* With a feel for aesthetics and an eagle eye for technical requirements, you’re experienced in making sure every design looks pixel\\-perfect.
* As we’ll produce a ton of assets for this project, we bank on your ability to organise and prioritise your workload to keep on top of your QA game.
* In addition to visual \\& technical QA skills, you have social and professional skills and feel confident in tackling a big global project in tag team with an international team of Monks.


**About Monks**
 Monks is the global, digital\\-first, data\\-driven, unitary operating brand of S4 Capital plc. With a legacy of innovation and specialized expertise, Monks combines an extraordinary range of global Marketing and Technology Services to redefine how brands interact with the world. Through Monks.Flow, its flagship AI ecosystem for marketing orchestration, Monks transforms marketing into a growth engine, collapsing timelines and connecting brands to culture in real time.
